text.message: Watch out guys, Karsten has played way more than me
its almost like it really hurt you
I’m just laughing at you, that’s all
i was trying to explain something, but youre talking too much, cant really listen
We haven’t rolled a 5 9 or 11. I’ve only picked up wheat the whole game
Blue at 7 don’t trade him the win
too bad with a player like green in the game
red can you help us out?
lmk what you need for a dev card
you gotta focus on development cards now red
